recommendation_reason: Phase 5 win-rate repair improved win rate, preserved trade count, and improved optimizer-basis net return; accepted stale_24_thresh010.
strengths: Accepted mutation preserves frequency and slightly improves optimizer-basis return/PF.
Stale exit repair reduces one low-quality stale-loss pocket without suppressing tail share.
weaknesses: Win rate remains well below the >50% goal.
Higher win-rate BE/RTS candidates were rejected because they reduced net return.
suggested_experiments: Structural Class D entry discrimination is required for further win-rate gains without clipping tail expectancy.
report: Phase 5 was run as a separate win-rate repair pass and promoted into the official Round 3 final artifacts.
